sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Will Domino's $9.99 Basketball Promo and Cash Returns Shift Domino's Pizza's (DPZ) Resilience Narrative?
feed.summary: Domino's Pizza recently reported strong Q4 and full-year 2025 results, including increased revenue and earnings, a higher dividend, and a significant share repurchase program. Concurrently, the company is implementing a "Best Deal Ever" US$9.99 pizza promotion during the basketball tournament to drive traffic. This article examines how this promotion, alongside ongoing cash returns to shareholders, could influence Domino's investment narrative and future earnings resilience, especially in a competitive and sometimes sluggish pizza market.

feed.title: Why CCC Intelligent Solutions (CCC) Is Up 7.4% After New AI Board Hire And $500M Buyback
feed.summary: CCC Intelligent Solutions (CCC) saw its stock rise 7.4% following the appointment of AI-focused executive John Schweitzer to its board and the authorization of a new US$500 million share repurchase program. These strategic moves are intended to scale the company's data-driven platform and manage capital structure, aligning with its investment narrative centered on recurring SaaS growth. While these actions are positive, investors should remain aware of potential challenges from declining industry claims and slower AI product adoption.

feed.title: Will Geopolitical Tension Around Dubai Project Reshape MGM Resorts International's (MGM) Global Expansion Narrative?
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International is facing increased investor scrutiny due to geopolitical tensions in the UAE, which are raising concerns about its planned US$1.20 billion non-gaming resort project, "The Island," in Dubai. This situation highlights how regional security risks can impact large-scale tourism developments crucial to MGM's international expansion goals. While the Dubai project's risks are noted, MGM's immediate investment narrative is still driven by operational performance, cash generation from existing properties, and significant share repurchase activity, though concentrated bets in volatile regions remain a concern.

feed.title: QT Imaging Pioneers Patient-Centric Breast Imaging Technology through Strategic Partnership
feed.summary: QT Imaging Holdings, Inc. announced the first commercial sale of its QTI Breast Acoustic CT™ System to True Health Center for Functional Medicine, following a strategic distribution partnership. This innovative system aims to improve breast imaging by eliminating compression, radiation, and the need for contrast agents, focusing on patient comfort and safety. The technology, validated by the National Institutes of Health, provides high-quality 3D images and addresses limitations of traditional methods, especially for dense breast tissue.

feed.title: SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust Faces Outflows Amid Tech Volatility
feed.summary: The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (SPY) has experienced a 2.04% decline in the past week and a significant 5-day net outflow of $11.01 billion, largely attributed to market sentiment regarding its major tech holdings. Despite this, individual companies like Nvidia and Apple are receiving bullish analyst ratings due to strong performance and new product developments, while Microsoft faces investor cool-off over its new Xbox project and substantial AI and cloud spending. The ETF's performance reflects the ongoing volatility and mixed investor reactions within the tech sector.

feed.title: BQ Stock Price and Chart — AMEX:BQ
feed.summary: This article provides a detailed financial overview and stock performance of Boqii Holding Limited (AMEX: BQ). It includes key financial metrics, historical price data, upcoming earnings reports, technical analysis indicators, and answers to frequently asked questions about the company's stock. The current stock price is 1.25 USD, having decreased by -7.05% in the last 24 hours.

feed.title: Is Baytex’s 2025 Loss and Asset Shift Altering The Investment Case For Baytex Energy (TSX:BTE)?
feed.summary: Baytex Energy Corp. reported a full-year 2025 net loss of C$603.78 million, reversing from a previous profit, and announced plans to sell its U.S. Eagle Ford assets to focus on Canadian operations. Despite the loss and leadership changes, the company maintains a strong balance sheet with C$857 million in cash and an undrawn C$750 million credit facility, supporting its continued investment in Duvernay growth, heavy oil drilling, dividends, and buybacks. The article suggests investors consider multiple viewpoints due to the company's dependency on supportive oil prices and the wide range of fair value estimates.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Dorothy Hayes Sells 17,000 Shares of BigBear.ai Ho
feed.summary: Dorothy Hayes, a Director at BigBear.ai Holdings Inc (BBAI), sold 17,000 shares of the company on March 6, 2026, reducing her holdings to 219,150 shares. This transaction is part of a trend of 20 insider sells and no buys at BigBear.ai over the past year. The stock is currently trading at $3.98, significantly above its GF Value of $0.59, indicating it is overvalued.

feed.title: Lululemon Fell 19% in 2026: Do Analysts See Recovery?
feed.summary: Lululemon's stock (LULU) has dropped significantly, trading more than 50% below its 52-week high due to a U.S. sales slump, CEO departure, proxy fight, and tariff headwinds, with Q4 earnings expected to show a 23% EPS collapse. Despite concerns, analysts still see a 22.5% upside, largely driven by strong international growth and anticipated product resets, though a valuation model suggests potential P/E compression. The upcoming March 17 earnings report is crucial for confirming the effectiveness of the turnaround strategy.

feed.title: Report: JPMorgan Considered ‘Company-Changing’ Discover Deal
feed.summary: J.P. Morgan Chase reportedly explored acquiring Discover Financial for about a year, starting in mid-2021, before Capital One's recent "$35 billion deal". The motivation for J.P. Morgan was to reduce reliance on existing card networks and gain control of Discover's payments network, particularly its Pulse debit and cash machine network. This potential deal highlights the banking giant's strategic efforts to diversify its payment processing capabilities.

feed.title: Caterpillar Showcases AI Technology and Equipment at Conexpo 2026
feed.summary: Caterpillar Inc. is highlighting its advanced technologies, AI capabilities, and autonomous equipment at CONEXPO-CON/AGG 2026 to help contractors address labor shortages, improve safety, and increase productivity. The company is showcasing new digital tools like Cat AI Assistant and autonomous machinery demonstrations, alongside expanded services for equipment management and rental. Caterpillar executives will further discuss their technology strategy during the keynote session, emphasizing solutions for current industry challenges.

feed.title: Norfolk Southern (NYSE:NSC) Price Target Raised to $317.00 at Rothschild & Co Redburn
feed.summary: Rothschild & Co Redburn has raised its price target for Norfolk Southern (NYSE:NSC) to $317 from $299, maintaining a "neutral" rating and suggesting a 4.61% potential upside. This adjustment comes after Norfolk Southern reported better-than-expected earnings per share of $3.22 against a $2.76 consensus, though revenue slightly missed expectations at $3 billion. The stock currently has an average analyst rating of "Hold" with a consensus price target of $308.95.

feed.title: Altria Group (NYSE:MO) Given New $50.00 Price Target at Jefferies Financial Group
feed.summary: Jefferies Financial Group has raised its price target for Altria Group (NYSE:MO) to $50.00 from $47.00, while maintaining an "underperform" rating, indicating a potential downside of 24.79% from its current price. Despite this, other analysts have set higher price targets, contributing to a consensus "Hold" rating and an average target price of $64.33 for the stock. Altria recently reported a slight EPS miss and a 0.5% decrease in revenue year-over-year, alongside a market capitalization of $111.15 billion and a P/E ratio of 16.18.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) Given New $290.00 Price Target at Robert W. Baird
feed.summary: Robert W. Baird has raised its price target for JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) to $290.00 from $280.00, while maintaining a "neutral" rating on the stock. This new target implies a modest 0.14% upside from JPM's previous close. The bank recently reported strong quarterly EPS of $5.23, surpassing analyst estimates, with revenue up 7.1% year-over-year.

feed.title: Illinois Tool Works (NYSE:ITW) Price Target Raised to $327.00 at JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has raised its price target for Illinois Tool Works (NYSE:ITW) to $327.00 from $310.00, maintaining an "overweight" rating and suggesting an 18.07% upside. This comes after ITW reported slightly better-than-expected quarterly earnings and provided a positive FY2026 EPS guidance. Other analysts have varying ratings, leading to a MarketBeat consensus of "Reduce" with a lower target of $275.69.

feed.title: Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR) Price Target Raised to $66.00 at Mizuho
feed.summary: Mizuho has increased its price target for Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR) to $66.00 from $65.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating despite the company narrowly missing Q4 earnings and revenue estimates. The real estate investment trust's stock currently has an average "Hold" rating and a consensus price target of $69.63 from other analysts. Insider selling has been observed, with executives reducing their holdings in February.

feed.title: Bausch Health to redeem ~$602M of outstanding notes due 2026
feed.summary: Bausch Health Companies Inc. announced its intention to redeem approximately $602 million of its outstanding 6.25% Senior Secured Notes due 2026. The redemption will take place on April 8, 2024, at a price of 100% of the principal amount plus accrued and unpaid interest. The company plans to fund this redemption using proceeds from its recent offering of 11.000% senior secured notes due 2029.

feed.title: FDA Declines New Indication for Incyte's (INCY) Zynyz Due to Manufacturing Issues
feed.summary: The FDA has rejected a new indication for Incyte's cancer treatment, Zynyz, due to manufacturing compliance issues at a third-party site operated by Catalent, a Novo Nordisk unit. Incyte plans to work with the FDA and Catalent to resolve these issues and resubmit the application. Despite this setback, Incyte demonstrates strong financial health with robust margins and growth metrics, and its stock is trading near historical lows.

feed.title: Bristol Myers Squibb (BMY) Gains FDA Approval for Sotyktu in Psoriatic Arthritis
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb (BMY) has received FDA approval to expand the use of its drug Sotyktu for treating adults with psoriatic arthritis, marking it as the first TYK2 inhibitor approved for this condition. This approval is based on positive results from two clinical trials. The company, a leader in immuno-oncology residing in the healthcare sector, shows strong financial health with robust operating margins, though its Altman Z-Score indicates a "grey area" for financial stress.

feed.title: New Buy Rating for Linde (LIN), the Basic Materials Giant
feed.summary: Bank of America Securities analyst Matthew DeYoe has maintained a Buy rating for Linde (LIN) with a price target of $520.00. Linde, a basic materials company, recently reported revenues of $8.76 billion and a net profit of $1.57 billion for the quarter ending December 31. Despite mixed insider sentiment with an increase in insider selling, the analyst consensus remains a Strong Buy with an average price target of $515.06.

feed.title: Trading App Robinhood Unveils Premium Credit Card to Compete with AmEx
feed.summary: Investment platform Robinhood has launched a premium credit card with a $695 annual fee, offering $3,000 in benefits, directly challenging established financial players like American Express and JPMorgan Chase. This move signifies Robinhood's strategic shift to attract affluent customers and rebrand itself as a comprehensive financial services provider. The company also introduced custodial investment accounts to cater to the evolving financial needs of its maturing user base.

feed.title: A2Z Launches Its Smart Carts with NTUC FairPrice, Singapore’s Largest Supermarket Chain
feed.summary: A2Z Smart Technologies Corp. announced a pilot program for its Cust2Mate Smart Carts with NTUC FairPrice, Singapore’s largest supermarket chain. The smart carts will arrive at a new FairPrice luxury store on July 15, 2022, and will be fully available to shoppers by September 1, 2022. These carts integrate with the FairPrice ecosystem to provide a seamless in-store digital shopping experience, featuring in-cart payment and in-store promotion guidance to manage inventory efficiently.

feed.title: COPP Stock Fund Price and Chart — NASDAQ:COPP
feed.summary: The Sprott Copper Miners ETF (COPP) aims to replicate an index of 30 to 50 companies heavily involved in copper mining, exploration, and production. The ETF, launched on March 5, 2024, has assets under management of $314.36 million and an expense ratio of 0.65%. Recent performance shows a 114.29% increase over the last year, with a current dividend yield of 1.87%.

feed.title: ArcBest filing notes ‘ongoing softness’ in the U.S. freight sector
feed.summary: ArcBest's recent SEC filing indicates persistent "softness" in the U.S. freight sector due to overcapacity and low demand. Key metrics like billed revenue per hundredweight are down, while tonnage per day is up, reflecting difficulty in raising rates. The company expects a less-than-typical increase in its first-quarter operating ratio, projecting lower net income and revenue compared to the previous year.

feed.title: A Look At RTX (RTX) Valuation As Defense Stocks Rally On Heightened Middle East Tensions
feed.summary: RTX (RTX) has seen increased attention and a rally in its stock price following heightened Middle East tensions and U.S. strikes. While one valuation narrative suggests a slight undervaluation for RTX, another discounted cash flow model indicates the stock might be overvalued. Investors are encouraged to consider both perspectives and associated risks before making investment decisions.

feed.title: A Look At Raymond James Financial (RJF) Valuation After Mixed Quarterly Results And Share Price Pullback
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial (RJF) experienced a share price pullback following mixed quarterly results, despite achieving record revenues and maintaining its pretax margin target. The article suggests RJF may be undervalued, trading at a discount to analyst targets and with a lower P/E than peers, with a narrative fair value of $184.83 against a closing price of $152.05. The company's investment in AI and strong bank segment loan growth are highlighted as potential growth drivers, though market and interest rate uncertainties pose risks.

feed.title: Southwest flight diverts to Atlanta airport after ‘security matter,’ airline says
feed.summary: A Southwest Airlines flight from Nashville to Fort Lauderdale was diverted to Hartsfield-Jackson Atlanta International Airport due to a "possible security matter." A passenger was detained by Atlanta police, but the FBI determined there was no credible threat, and no charges were filed. Travelers were later moved to another plane to continue to their destination.

feed.title: Amcor (AMCR) delivers strong EPS and synergy gains after Berry merger, Truist reiterates buy
feed.summary: This article reports that Amcor (AMCR) has delivered strong EPS growth and synergy gains following its merger with Berry, leading Truist to reiterate its "Buy" rating for the stock. Amcor's financial performance after the merger has been positive, indicating successful integration and benefits from the acquisition. The reiterated "Buy" rating by Truist suggests continued analyst confidence in Amcor's future prospects.

feed.title: Biotech Aptorum faces Nasdaq $1 warning but keeps listing for now
feed.summary: Aptorum Group (NASDAQ: APM) received a Nasdaq notification for non-compliance with the $1 minimum bid price rule. The company has a 180-calendar-day grace period until September 1, 2026, to regain compliance and is exploring options, including a potential reverse stock split. The notification does not immediately impact the trading or listing of APM shares.

feed.title: Agricultural Industry Champion Roger Hoy Retires, Eric Smith Named Director of Nebraska Tractor Test Lab
feed.summary: Roger Hoy has retired as Director of the Nebraska Tractor Test Lab (NTTL) after nearly two decades, passing the leadership to Eric Smith, a fellow John Deere veteran. Hoy's tenure was marked by a deep understanding of industry and academia, bridging manufacturers, regulators, and farmers, while mentoring students and forecasting automation as agriculture's most disruptive technology. Smith, with extensive experience in agricultural engineering and standards, is set to continue the lab's mission of rigorous testing, industry partnership, and educational outreach for future engineers, with a focus on electrification and automation.

feed.title: Best Buy Pivots to High-Margin Digital Growth: Why $77 Could Be the Next Stop
feed.summary: Best Buy (BBY) is transitioning its business model to focus on high-margin digital growth, leveraging initiatives like its digital Marketplace and Best Buy Ads. Despite a slight miss on Q4 2026 revenue, the company exceeded EPS and EBITDA expectations, demonstrating strong operational profitability. Analysts anticipate a target price of $77.75, an attractive 17.89% potential return, driven by these strategic shifts and the impending consumer upgrade cycle spurred by AI-integrated hardware.

feed.title: ARDT INVESTOR DEADLINE APPROACHING: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Reminds Ardent Health (ARDT) Investors of Securities Class Action Deadline on March 9, 2026
feed.summary: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is reminding investors of Ardent Health (ARDT) that the deadline to seek lead plaintiff status in a federal securities class action lawsuit is March 9, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Ardent Health and its executives made misleading statements and failed to disclose information regarding the company's accounts receivable. This follows a significant drop in Ardent's stock price after the company announced a $43 million reduction in revenue due to accounting changes and a $54 million increase in professional liability reserves in Q3 2025.

feed.title: Teton Advisors LLC Invests $1.25 Million in Anterix Inc. $ATEX
feed.summary: Teton Advisors LLC has made a new investment of $1.25 million in Anterix Inc. (NASDAQ:ATEX) by purchasing 58,000 shares. This transaction gives Teton Advisors a 0.31% stake in the company, while insiders, including CEO Scott A. Lang, have also increased their holdings, now owning 45.61% of the stock. Anterix receives a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with an average price target of $50.00, despite recent downgrades.

feed.title: SPX Gestao de Recursos Ltda Reduces Stock Holdings in Credicorp Ltd. $BAP
feed.summary: SPX Gestao de Recursos Ltda significantly decreased its holdings in Credicorp Ltd. (NYSE:BAP) by 31.2% in the third quarter, selling 58,369 shares and now holding 128,592 shares valued at approximately $34.24 million. Credicorp, which constitutes 2.8% of SPX Gestao de Recursos Ltda's total holdings, recently missed EPS estimates but exceeded revenue expectations. The stock currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with an average price target below its current trading price.

feed.title: Sphere 3D Corp. Stock Gains as Market Awaits Strategic Moves
feed.summary: Sphere 3D Corp. (NASDAQ: ANY) saw its stock rise by 16.44% amidst market anticipation of strategic moves, though the company faces significant profitability challenges with negative EBIT and EBITDA margins. Despite these hurdles, a strong gross margin of 66.5% and a current ratio of 6.3 indicate some operational efficiency and liquidity. The article emphasizes that while speculative trading has led to price volatility, the immediate outlook remains bearish without improved fundamentals or positive announcements.

feed.title: ALNYLAM PHARMACEUTICALS Executives Sell Shares
feed.summary: Several top executives at ALNYLAM PHARMACEUTICALS, including the Chief Commercial Officer, Chief Financial Officer, Chief Executive Officer, and EVP Chief R&D, have sold shares of the company's common stock. These sales were part of mandatory sell-to-cover provisions for tax obligations upon the vesting of restricted stock units. The total value of shares sold by these executives exceeds $4 million.

feed.title: Evaluating Advanced Drainage Systems (WMS) After Recent Share Price Pullback And Conflicting Valuation Signals
feed.summary: Advanced Drainage Systems (WMS) has seen a recent share price decline despite a strong long-term performance. While one market narrative suggests the stock is undervalued at around $146 with a fair value of $197.20, driven by increasing demand for stormwater management, Simply Wall St's own DCF model indicates it might be overvalued with a fair value of $112.01. Investors are encouraged to consider these conflicting valuation signals and assess the underlying assumptions.

feed.title: Ross Stores Surges on Blowout Earnings: Could This Spark a Run to a $213 Target?
feed.summary: Ross Stores (ROST) experienced a significant surge in stock price following a strong fourth-quarter earnings report, exceeding revenue and EPS estimates. The company demonstrated resilience in its off-price retail model, driven by increased customer traffic and transactions, and announced a new $2.55 billion stock repurchase program and a 10% dividend increase. Analysts project a potential 8.15% return to a street target of $213.75, based on Ross Stores' disciplined inventory management and aggressive expansion plans for 110 new stores in the coming year.

feed.title: RTX Stock Rises Amid Defense Production Expansion and Strategic Contracts
feed.summary: RTX Corporation's stock has risen by 4.33% due to heightened market optimism driven by increased defense spending plans and strategic contract wins. The company is benefiting from geopolitical tensions, a $256.26 million contract modification for the F135 propulsion system, and efforts to diversify supply chains away from rare earth elements. Analysts like Deutsche Bank have raised price targets, reflecting confidence in RTX's robust financial performance and expanding production capabilities.

feed.title: CF Industries Gains from Projected Nitrogen Price Surge as Barclays Raises Outlook
feed.summary: CF Industries (CF) stock is up by 4.93% following Barclays' raised price target from $100 to $120, driven by anticipated increases in nitrogen prices due to geopolitical tensions and the company's strong financial health. While analysts generally suggest a 'Hold' rating with some caution due to insider selling, CF's significant profitability and low-carbon ammonia initiatives present potential for future growth. The article also details the company's financial overview, technical analysis, and other analyst adjustments for CF Industries.

feed.title: AutoZone Powers Through Q4 Headwinds: How Analysts Justify a $4,209 Target
feed.summary: AutoZone (AZO) reported a complex fiscal second-quarter 2026 earnings, with revenue slightly missing estimates but adjusted EPS beating them despite negative impacts from a $59 million LIFO charge and severe winter storms. Analysts project a $4,209.04 target price, representing a 15.7% potential return, fueled by the company's "Mega-Hub" strategy, aggressive expansion, and stock repurchases, with expectations of increased demand after winter. The company is actively transforming its unit economics to dominate the DIY and commercial auto parts markets by leveraging massive supply chain investments.

feed.title: Bristol Myers wins FDA nod to expand Sotyktu label (BMY:NYSE)
feed.summary: The FDA has approved an expanded label for Bristol Myers Squibb's drug, Sotyktu, to include the treatment of adults with psoriatic arthritis. This approval is for the tyrosine kinase inhibitor which targets an inflammatory condition affecting both musculoskeletal and skin systems. The decision is supported by further research.

feed.title: Had You Invested $1,000 in Coca-Cola or PepsiCo 10 Years Ago, Here's What You'd Have Today
feed.summary: Over the last decade, an investment in Coca-Cola would have yielded a better return than PepsiCo, with Coca-Cola returning +140.27% compared to PepsiCo's +120.04%. Coca-Cola's success is attributed to its asset-light franchise model, focus on brand marketing, and the growth of its Zero Sugar product line while PepsiCo faced challenges from a Rockstar write-down and decreased snack volume due to GLP-1 drug adoption. Both companies are Dividend Kings, offering consistent dividend increases, though neither matched the S&P 500's performance over the same period.

feed.title: American Airlines expands digital wallet integration for seamless traveller experience
feed.summary: American Airlines has become the first U.S. carrier to integrate boarding passes with Samsung Wallet, providing real-time flight updates directly to passengers' digital wallets. This initiative is part of American's mobile-first strategy, which also includes enhancements to its mobile app for improved trip management and disruption handling. The airline aims to offer customers more control and convenience by streamlining access to critical travel information.

feed.title: Amplify Energy Corp expected to post earnings of 12 cents a share - Earnings Preview
feed.summary: Amplify Energy Corp (AMPY) is projected to report earnings of 12 cents per share. This information comes from a Refinitiv earnings preview, indicating an upcoming financial announcement for the company.

feed.title: Berkshire CEO Greg Abel on working with Buffett, Kraft Heinz and using all his salary to buy the stock
feed.summary: Berkshire Hathaway CEO Greg Abel announced he would use his entire after-tax salary to buy Berkshire shares annually, starting with a recent $15.3 million purchase. He also confirmed Berkshire's support for Kraft Heinz's new CEO Steve Cahillane's decision to pause the company split and stated that Berkshire is not planning to sell its Kraft Heinz stake immediately. Abel addressed Berkshire's resumption of share buybacks, attributing it to the stock being undervalued and noting that he consulted with Warren Buffett on the decision.

feed.title: SPX Gestao de Recursos Ltda Takes $25.64 Million Position in First Solar, Inc. $FSLR
feed.summary: SPX Gestao de Recursos Ltda has acquired a new stake worth $25.64 million in First Solar (FSLR), making it their 15th largest holding, despite the company missing Q3 EPS expectations and facing negative analyst sentiment and insider selling. Institutional investors now own 92.08% of First Solar, but the company's 2026 guidance disappointed analysts, leading to multiple downgrades. Additionally, insider selling and an investor investigation by Pomerantz LLP further contribute to a cautious outlook for First Solar.

feed.title: SPX Gestao de Recursos Ltda Makes New Investment in International Business Machines Corporation $IBM
feed.summary: SPX Gestao de Recursos Ltda has acquired a new stake of 10,000 shares in International Business Machines Corporation (IBM), valued at approximately $2.822 million. This investment comes as IBM exceeded its quarterly earnings estimates with an EPS of $4.52 and revenue of $19.69 billion. Institutional investors now hold 58.96% of IBM's stock, and analysts maintain a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $320.87.

feed.title: SPX Gestao de Recursos Ltda Acquires Shares of 5,600 Honeywell International Inc. $HON
feed.summary: SPX Gestao de Recursos Ltda has acquired a new stake of 5,600 shares in Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) during the third quarter, valued at approximately $1.179 million. This purchase is part of broader institutional investor activity, while corporate insiders have sold shares totaling around $4.24 million over the last three months. Honeywell recently beat quarterly earnings and revenue estimates, announced a dividend, and holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts.

feed.title: 20,000 Shares in ConocoPhillips $COP Bought by SPX Gestao de Recursos Ltda
feed.summary: SPX Gestao de Recursos Ltda recently acquired 20,000 shares of ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) worth approximately $1.892 million, according to its latest 13F filing. Other institutional investors have also adjusted their holdings in the energy producer. ConocoPhillips reported quarterly earnings of $1.02 per share, missing consensus estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend of $0.84 per share.
